data.change_summary: Closed the three pending milestone-record gaps in one pass. The filesystem adapter now keeps milestone-specific locks under a hidden lock namespace instead of creating `milestones/<id>/` just to lock, `persist_plan` and `update_task_run` read `status.json` before any side-effecting writes so typoed milestone IDs no longer strand a future create, task-run reads now reject any row whose embedded `milestone_id` disagrees with the file being read, and runless retries now auto-finalize the superseded open attempt before appending the new one so a later `run_id=None` completion stays unambiguous and auditable.
outstanding_risks: Milestone mutations still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction; milestone-scoped locking and replay-safe updates mitigate this, but a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed or state is reconciled from lineage.

Malformed or manually edited lineage can still contain multiple simultaneous runless open attempts for the same bead/project; this round prevents the normal start path from creating that state going forward, but deterministic finalization of already-corrupt data still depends on repair or richer caller metadata.

steps.description: Inspected the current milestone_record model, service, and filesystem adapter paths against the three pending amendments to isolate the exact retry, lock-placement, and lineage-read failure modes.

Updated `src/adapters/fs.rs` to move milestone lock files out of the milestone directory, validate `TaskRunEntry.milestone_id` on every read, and auto-fail a superseded runless open attempt before appending a new runless retry.

Adjusted `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` so `persist_plan` and `update_task_run` read the snapshot before any write-side effects, and added milestone_record regressions for missing-milestone safety, misfiled lineage rejection, and runless retry completion.
Reformatted the workspace and revalidated the milestone_record path with targeted tests and clippy.
